news.summary: Frontera Energy Corporation reported a net income of $27.5 million and income from operations of $13.6 million for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025. They generated Operating EBITDA of $83.5 million and Adjusted Infrastructure EBITDA of $28.6 million. The company intends to complete a new $220 million secured loan and commence a $65 million Substantial Issuer Bid. Additionally, they declared a quarterly dividend of C$0.0625 per share, totaling $3.5 million, and released their 2024 Sustainability Report. Frontera's first quarter production averaged 40,477 boe/d, and they finished the quarter with total cash balance of $199.8 million. The Company invested $46.7 million in capital expenditures during this period. They also drilled 13 development wells at their Quifa and CPE-6 blocks in Colombia. Total debt stood at $505.5 million, with net debt at $290.7 million at the end of the quarter.
news.headline: Frontera reported Q1 2025 financial results: $27.5M net income, $83.5M operating EBITDA, $44.9M segment income. Initiating $65M share repurchase.

news.summary: Bitcoin saw a 4.3% increase on May 9, breaking $100,000 for the first time since February. This surge triggered $800 million in short liquidations, the biggest since 2021. Analysts suggest a $182,200 target with some predicting a $1 million price by 2025. Bitcoin traded at $104,150 on May 8, and market sentiment, measured by Crypto Fear & Greed Index, rose from 65 to 73. Liquidations in the last 24 hours surpassed $925 million, with $800 million from shorts. Over $2.85 billion in ask-orders are close to the all-time high of $109,500. While the price is experiencing high momentum, some see overbought conditions, but moving averages and MACD support further upside. Analysts set ambitious targets, with projections ranging from $106,000 to $170,000 and even up to $1 million by Binance founder Changpeng Zhao. A bull flag pattern on the weekly chart suggests a potential target of $182,200. However, the article cautions that all investment decisions carry risks and readers should conduct their own research.
news.headline: Bitcoin's price surges 4.3% on May 9, hitting above $100,000 for the first time since February. Potential price target of $1 million in 2025. BTC triggers $800 million in short liquidations, largest since 2021. Analysts see bull flag suggesting a $182,200 goal. 24-hour crypto market liquidations surpass $925 million. Market sentiment climbs from 65 to 73 on Crypto Fear & Greed Index. Bullish momentum with trader targets at $106,000 and higher year-end projections. Bull flag formation on weekly chart hints at $180,000 target.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve maintained interest rates at a range of 4.25% to 4.50%, continuing the pause in rate policy for the third time. This decision prolongs the wait for potential homebuyers seeking relief from high mortgage costs. Fed Chairman Jerome Powell stated that no further interest rate cuts will occur until there is enough economic data to support such actions. Recent data from the Mortgage Bankers Association and National Association of Realtors showed a 12.7% decline in mortgage applications and a 5.9% drop in existing home sales in March. This news disappointed those in the housing market looking for mortgage rate relief. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fed kept interest rates at 4.25%-4.50%, no cuts until economic data supports. Mortgage applications fell by 12.7%, existing home sales dropped by 5.9% in March. Financial hurdles to owning a home are extremely high.

news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.8%, which is the lowest rate recorded in the last five years. The total number of people employed has also risen by 250,000 compared to the previous year. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase with the main index rising by 10% in the last quarter. This positive trend is expected to continue in the upcoming months, according to economic analysts.
news.headline: US stock futures fluctuate prior to discussions with China, summarized in Markets Wrap.

news.summary: Well-known economist Mohamed A. El-Erian has raised concerns about the potential negative impacts on domestic industries due to a significant increase in China's exports in April. Contrary to expectations of a 2% rise, China experienced an 8% surge in exports during this period. Notably, despite a 21% decrease in sales to the United States, a major trading partner, China's overall export growth remained strong. El-Erian's analysis indicates that this boost in exports is a result of China's strategic shift towards other markets, posing challenges for certain domestic industries. He suggested that this redirection of exports by China may worsen existing concerns. El-Erian also highlighted that Chinese products are now finding their way into new markets as they adjust to lower demand from the U.S. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Mohamed El-Erian warns of negative impacts on domestic industries as China's exports rise 8%, despite 21% drop in US shipments.

news.summary: In Shenyang, China, on May 9, 2025, the Liaoning International Communication Center launched the "Show Your Chinese Talents—International Interactive Communication Project for International Students in Liaoning to Display Chinese Talents". This project aims to showcase the talents of international students in Liaoning. Key details about this initiative include the location in Shenyang, China, the launch date of May 9, 2025, and the specific focus on highlighting the talents of international students in Liaoning through interactive communication.
news.headline: LICC in China invites int'l students to showcase talents through short videos in a new project. (Word count: 14)

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, IASO Biotherapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company based in Shanghai, Nanjing, China, and San Francisco, disclosed its dedication to advancing cutting-edge cell therapies and biologics. They specialize in the research, development, production, and distribution of these innovative medical solutions.
news.headline: IASO Bio received Orphan Drug Designation from Saudi FDA for Equecabtagene Autoleucel. Company focused on cell therapies.

news.summary: German authorities seized 34 million euros ($38 million) in cryptocurrency from eXch, a platform implicated in laundering stolen funds during Bybit's $1.4 billion hack. The seizure involved various crypto assets including Bitcoin, Ether, Litecoin, and Dash. This marks the third-largest crypto confiscation in Germany's Federal Criminal Police Office's history. Authorities also took control of eXch's server infrastructure with over 8TB of data and shut down the platform. eXch operated since 2014, facilitating $1.9 billion in crypto transfers, some believed to be of criminal origin. It was allegedly involved in laundering funds from other hacks like Multisig and FixedFloat. eXch had denied involvement initially but announced termination of services by May 1. The senior public prosecutor emphasized the importance of cracking down on platforms enabling money laundering.
news.headline: Germany seizes $38M crypto from eXch in Bybit hack-linked case; third-largest confiscation in BKA history. Platform shut down.

news.summary: Nidec Corporation, a leading company in technology (TOKYO: 6594) (OTC US: NJDCY), based in KYOTO, Japan, recently disclosed its decision to retract the bid to acquire shares of Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. The target company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange, Inc., and the acquisition was set to occur through a tender offer starting May 9, 2025. This update follows an earlier press release titled “Notice Regarding Commencement of Tender O” on April 3, 2025.
news.headline: Nidec withdraws the tender offer for Makino Milling Machine Co. (Securities Code: 6135) listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on May 9, 2025, FLEX LNG LTD. held its 2025 Annual General Meeting for shareholders on May 8, 2025, at 14:00 hrs. The event took place at Hamilton Princess and Beach Club located at 76 Pitts Bay Road, Hamilton HMCX, Bermuda. The meeting included a review of the audited financial statements and other important company updates.
news.headline: FLEX LNG LTD. held its 2025 AGM on May 8th at Hamilton Princess in Bermuda, updating shareholders.

news.summary: Valmet Oyj issued a press release on May 9, 2025, at 10:45 a.m. EEST in Helsinki. They have announced an upcoming Capital Markets Day scheduled to take place on Thursday, June 5, 2025. The event will be open to analysts, institutional investors, and other stakeholders in the capital market. This gathering aims to provide insights into Valmet's operations, strategies, and performance, offering valuable information for interested parties.
news.headline: Valmet Oyj to hold Capital Markets Day on June 5, 2025 for analysts and investors. Helsinki, May 9, 2025 - PRNewswire.
